facts.text: User has a MSc in Data Science and a BSc in Economics.
User recently visited the gym and is experiencing shoulder pain.
User is seeking advice on training around the shoulder injury and strengthening/stretching exercises.
User is experiencing pain described as sharp, dull, or aching (unspecified).
User is advised to stop aggravating movements and focus on low-impact activities like walking, swimming (backstroke), and stationary cycling.
User suspects a tight thoracic spine is contributing to bench press instability.
User has previously been diagnosed with a tight thoracic spine.
User is incorporating foam rolling, wall slides, and overhead reach with rotation to address the thoracic spine.
User is focusing on maintaining ‘eyes under bar’ during the bench press.
User is starting with lower reps (3-5 sets of 6-8) and a controlled descent during the bench press.
User is pausing at the bottom of the bench press.
User is prioritizing a consultation with a physiotherapist for a thorough assessment.
